positive: A stylized, clean vector illustration of a majestic mountain range at sunset. The composition should be centrally focused, featuring deep blue and purple mountains silhouetted against a vibrant gradient sky of warm oranges, pinks, and yellows. Include scattered, geometric constellations and minimalist crescent moons. Use strong contrast and crisp lines, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Minimalist, abstract nature print, retro-pop art style, clean silhouette, perfect symmetry, 8k detail.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, low detail, realistic photograph, complex background
